input:
He has ridiculed our elders, abused our forefathers and our gods, looked with contempt on our religion and caused disunity to creep into our ranks. We have certainly suffered a great deal from him.” As they said that, the Prophet (peace be upon him) appeared. He walked to the Kaʿbah and started his ṭawāf. When he passed by them, a nasty taunt was directed at him. His colour changed but he went on with his ṭawāf. When he passed by them the second time, they repeated their taunt and his face changed colour again.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 9: Misrepresentation

output.scene_title: The Prophet Faces Taunts at the Ka'bah
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 9: Misrepresentation

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Mid 40s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a brown cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown without face, distinguished by white thobe and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Unspecified Taunter
characters.appearance: Dark shape of an adult male, obscured features, wearing dark clothing. Silhouetted against the light of the Ka'bah, making it difficult to discern any details.

output.moral_lesson: The Prophet's patience and kindness in the face of adversity is a powerful lesson in dealing with difficulties and persecution.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet was walking around the Ka'bah when some people started taunting him. Despite their nasty words, he continued his prayer. When they repeated their taunts, his face changed colour, but he still kept going.

compliance.notes: Prophet not shown face. Silhouetted antagonist makes scene less confrontational. Warm emotional scene, appropriate for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of the Ka'bah, 7th century Makkah. The Prophet (dignified man in white thobe and brown cloak, white turban) walks around the Ka'bah, shown from behind, with his shoulders slightly hunched. In the background, a dark shape of an adult male, obscured features, wearing dark clothing, silhouetted against the light of the Ka'bah. Simple mud-brick walls, ornate Ka'bah doors. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
